description.default: AAD Object ID (GUID) of the Company Equipment Leader user. Used by Power Automate flows to route review notifications.

label.description: AAD Object ID (GUID) of the Company Equipment Leader user. Used by Power Automate flows to route review notifications.

hint.default: Find in Azure AD (Entra ID) > Users > [Equipment Leader name] > Object ID. Must be a GUID.

label.description: Find in Azure AD (Entra ID) > Users > [Equipment Leader name] > Object ID. Must be a GUID.
